message:
perf(widgets): command palette scorer optimization + drag/file_picker improvements

Command Palette Scorer (scorer.rs):
- Preallocate results vectors to reduce allocation overhead during fuzzy matching
- Added structured JSONL perf diagnostics (p50/p95/p99 + variance) for the
  5000-item corpus benchmark
- Baseline: ~206.5ms → ~54.8ms mean through allocation reduction
- Identified via perf profiling (bd-2me70): hotspots in BayesianScorer::word_start_match_ascii
  and Vec drop overhead in score() function

Drag Widget (drag.rs):
- Extended drag state machine for smoother interactions
- Improved boundary detection and snapping behavior
- Better handling of rapid drag sequences

File Picker (file_picker.rs):
- Additional helper methods for file selection state
- Improved directory traversal edge cases

These optimizations were coordinated across multiple agent sessions
(RedSpring, LilacDune, IvoryCompass) working on bd-2me70 performance budget.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
